main.description: Sync-state marker for the are.na mirror, written once per run at rkey `self`. Stores per-channel freshness (updated_at + contents count) so unchanged channels are skipped, and a settings fingerprint so a scope/media/namespace change forces a full re-walk. Keeping state on the PDS keeps the mirror itself stateless (cron-friendly).

settings.description: Fingerprint of the options the run used (scope, media mode, nsidBase…).

partial.description: True when the run stopped early (time budget, channel subset); deletion passes are skipped on partial runs and the next run resumes.

channels.description: Freshness entries for channels completed under the current settings.
